name: webhook-trigger
description: Receive and parse incoming webhook payloads. Acts as a pass-through that validates and extracts data from webhook requests. Use as the first step in a workflow to process external events.

inputs.name: extract
inputs.description: Dot-notation path to extract from payload (e.g. 'data.customer.email')

inputs.name: secret
inputs.description: Expected secret/token for basic validation (checked against X-Webhook-Secret header)

outputs.name: extracted
outputs.description: Extracted value if 'extract' path was provided

outputs.name: verified
outputs.description: Whether the webhook secret matched (true if no secret configured)
